name: Osamu Dazai
description:
ཐིཋྀ ~ [Omegaverse AU] ~ Seeing his Omega nesting after he focuses on work too much, Dazai decides that night it's finally time to better the situation

‎

Warnings

  • Alpha!Dazai & Omega!User

‎

If you couldn't tell already, I love the more fluffy side of Omegaverse and especially nesting. We need more Omegaverse fluff!!!

Also I'm switching all my Dazai bots from 'Dazai Osamu' to 'Osamu Dazai'. I knew Osamu was his first name, but I just never bothered to ever fix it. I might change all of the bots later to match this new change, but as of right now I need some sleep for my night shift

‎

15/06/24: I can hear the singing chain in the reviews all the way from my windmill here in the Netherlands /j
